name: Deferred - Old Attachment - 1
description: First returns for old attachments from earlier chapters of a life.

results.description: [contact][defer old-attachment 2 1d6] Someone you had loved, nearly loved, or never quite left behind in {origin} found their way back into your life.
results.name: old-attachment-1

results.description: [defer old-attachment 2 1d6] A name from {origin} was spoken again in a tone that made the years between feel dishonest.
results.name: old-attachment-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ][defer old-attachment 2 1d6] Someone bound to your heart in {origin} proved unwilling to remain only memory.
results.name: old-attachment-1

results.description: [contact][defer old-attachment 2 1d6] An old attachment from {origin} returned with the caution of a person unsure whether hope was still permitted.
results.name: old-attachment-1

results.description: [defer old-attachment 2 1d6] A figure from {origin} whom you had never fully forgotten appeared again when forgetting had finally become possible.
results.name: old-attachment-1

results.description: [contact][defer old-attachment 2 1d6] Someone once dear to you in {origin} returned with questions that courtesy could not contain for long.
results.name: old-attachment-1

results.description: [defer old-attachment 2 1d6] A message from {origin} revived an old attachment before you had decided whether that counted as blessing or nuisance.
results.name: old-attachment-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp][defer old-attachment 2 1d6] Someone tied to {sourceTitle} remembered your former closeness more clearly than was convenient.
results.name: old-attachment-1

results.description: [contact][defer old-attachment 2 1d6] An old affection from {origin} returned wrapped in civility and not nearly enough distance.
results.name: old-attachment-1

results.description: [defer old-attachment 2 1d6] What had begun in {origin} as comfort, desire, or promise appeared again with unfinished force.
results.name: old-attachment-1

results.description: [contact][defer old-attachment 2 1d6] Someone once intimate to you from {origin} crossed your path with too much history to ignore.
results.name: old-attachment-1

results.description: [defer old-attachment 2 1d6] The old attachment from {origin} returned not as a wound reopened, but as one that had never healed properly.
results.name: old-attachment-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ][defer old-attachment 2 1d6] A familiar face from {origin} reminded you how much of the past can survive silence.
results.name: old-attachment-1

results.description: [contact][defer old-attachment 2 1d6] Someone whose place in your life was never simple in {origin} found you again as if complexity itself had memory.
results.name: old-attachment-1

results.description: [defer old-attachment 2 1d6] A broken closeness from {origin} returned with enough warmth to be dangerous.
results.name: old-attachment-1

results.description: [contact][defer old-attachment 2 1d6] Someone you had once meant a great deal to in {origin} reappeared when you were least prepared to be measured by who you had been.
results.name: old-attachment-1
